[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 180
- Description: AI babysitting session: retail field reports, dao_client formula fix, production deploy
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1037
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/51
  
  Details:
  Oversaw AI assistants through end-to-end implementation, debugging, and deployment of multiple DAO infrastructure pieces.
  
  What happened:
  1. Diagnosed why [RETAIL FIELD REPORT EVENT] from store_interaction_history.html was only logging to Telegram Chat Logs but not Stores Visits Field Reports — root cause was the code was committed but never deployed to production.
  2. Deployed sentiment_importer master to seni_ror (Rails) and seni_sk (Sidekiq) via deploy.sh --skip-migrate. Verified both services came up cleanly.
  3. Identified that dao_client's report_ai_agent_contribution.py was hard-coding Amount=0 and TDG Issued=0 with a non-standard 'AI Agent (software & documentation)' type. Updated it to enforce the DApp-matching formula:
     - Time: Amount = minutes, TDG = hours × 100
     - USD: Amount = USD, TDG = USD
  4. Updated DAO_CLIENT_AI_AGENT_CONTRIBUTIONS.md convention doc to reflect the new CLI interface.
  5. Resubmitted the original retail field report contribution with correct Time-based Amount/TDG.
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1037
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/51
